results.title: p0-t06a-iso-no-compositional-ref
results.prompt:
Image 1 is the cowboy character reference.
Image 2 is a STYLE reference.

Preserve from Image 1: face, beard, hat, scarf, jacket, build.

Borrow from Image 2: ink wash, palette, linework, atmospheric haze.
Do NOT borrow from Image 2: subject, composition, location, props.

Generate: the cowboy from Image 1 standing alone at the top of a dune, looking down toward the camera. Late afternoon backlight. Single figure in frame. Sky fills upper two thirds.

16:9 aspect ratio.

resolved_params.system_prompt: STYLE: European bande dessinée ink wash. Duotone palette — warm cream paper + sepia/olive ink. Loose confident linework, cross-hatch for shadow and material texture, atmospheric falloff in the distance. No vibrant color, no rendered polish, no photographic detail.
